name: Axalta Coating Systems, LLC
h1: Axalta Coating Systems's GCC footprint in India
lede: Axalta Coating Systems runs three capability centers across two Indian cities. Gurugram and Vadodara, covering CoE, gcc/gic and R&D, built over nine years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Axalta Coating Systems office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Axalta Coating Systems GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Axalta Coating Systems runs 3 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Gurugram, Vadodara), covering CoE, gcc/gic and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Axalta Coating Systems's India footprint covers Gurugram and Vadodara, spanning CoE, gcc/gic and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seven decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Axalta Coating Systems operate in India?
faq.a: Axalta Coating Systems operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Axalta Coating Systems have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Axalta Coating Systems's India GCC footprint spans Gurugram and Vadodara.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Axalta Coating Systems run in India?
faq.a: Axalta Coating Systems runs CoE, gcc/gic and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Axalta Coating Systems's India GCCs?
faq.a: Axalta Coating Systems's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Axalta Coating Systems's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 7 leaders at Axalta Coating Systems's India centers, across Finance, IT and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
